title: AuthSentinel Runtime (base)
description: Shared runtime concepts used by agent and proxy configs: key layout prefixes, cookie/session naming, and common conventions. Per-binary configs reference this for documentation only; validation is per-binary.

session_redis_prefix.description: Redis key prefix for session, PKCE, refresh lock, and related keys (e.g. auth)

cookie_name.description: Name of the session cookie (must match between agent and proxy)
